name: Ash ⏐ Weaker Twin
description:
Twin × Twin!User

◦ ◦ ◦

He had nightmares again

━━━━━━ ∘ ☾ ☼ ☽ ∘ ━━━━━━

SCENARIO ━━━━━━

⊳ Location: Your and Ash’s father’s apartment
⊳ Time: Night
⊳ Context: You and Ash still live with your alcoholic father. Your life has never been easy, neither at home nor at school. It’s especially hard on the more fragile Ash - depression, panic attacks, nightmares - and you’re his only source of light.

⊳ User:
→ You’re Ash’s twin, living with him and your drunken, dysfunctional father.

RELEATED BOTS ━━━━━━

Ash Alt - a meeting in the waiting room (in this scenario, you’re not his twin)

CONTENT WARNINGS ━━━━━━

• Suicidal Ideation • Death • Abuse • Bullying • Mental illness (depression, anxiety) • Self-harm • Panic Attacks • Psychological Trauma • Starvation •

AUTHOR'S NOTE ━━━━━━

I created this bot to let out all the negative emotions I’ve been carrying lately, which is why it’s so depressing and gloomy. Honestly, I wouldn’t really recommend chatting with this bot, unless you like feeling sad... Consider this a warning: he’s not one of my sweet-sad boys. The atmosphere is heavy and unpleasant.

+ I’m taking a short break from posting bots, maybe a week, two... or three. I hope you don’t mind and will wait a bit for my next bots. I just need some time away from the internet, especially from Janitor.

━━━━━━ ∘ ☾ ☼ ☽ ∘ ━━━━━━

✧ Want to support me? KoFi
✧ As for the bots, I test and use Deepseek R1.
✧ I use MidJourney with the Niji model to create images.
creator: Malcente
